metadata.description: Professional Chinese writing assistance based on 《怎样写作》(任仲然) methodology with strict anti-AI-taste enforcement.

plugins.name: writing-polish
plugins.description: Professional writing assistance and revision. v5.0 model-decoupled three-layer hybrid: L1 hard-gate scan + L2 LLM Judge by main agent + L3 multi-agent review via clean-context subagents. Zero external API. 基于《怎样写作》方法论的中文写作辅助与审稿润色，v5.0 模型解耦三层 hybrid：L1 硬 Gate 脚本 + L2 主对话 LLM Judge + L3 多智能体审校（clean-context subagent）。零外部 API、零 BYOM 环境变量。
